column2: 16Personalities Quiz. You will need to first take the quiz located at https://www.16personalities.com/. Select your personality letters below. E.g. ENTJ-A, INTP-A, etc.
column3: What is your major? (Please type out your full major name based on USC Catalogue, e.g. 'Computer Science', 'Business Administration')
column4: If applicable.  What is your 2nd major? (Please type out the full major name)
column5: What is your minor? (Please type out the full minor name based on USC Catalogue, e.g. 'Applied Analytics')
column6: If applicable, what is your 2nd minor? (Please type our the full minor name)
column7: Are you in the Progressive Degree Program (PDP)?
column11: How many units are you taking this semester? Please enter a number.
column14: What is your plan for after graduation?
column15: What industry are you going into or planning on going into after graduation?
column16: What role are you going into or planning on going into after graduation? Please choose the one that best fits.
column17: On a scale of 1-5, with 5 being the highest, how would you rate your USC academic experience?
column18: On average, how many USC football games do you attend per season?
column19: Are you or have you ever been actively part of a social fraternity/sorority at USC?
column20: Are you or have you ever been actively part of a professional fraternity/sorority at USC?
column21: Are you or have you ever been actively part of a professional organization or regularly attend/observe professional activities/events?  E.g. LACI, Trojan Marketing, LavaLabs, etc.
column22: Are you or have you ever been actively part of a cultural student organization or regularly attend/observe cultural activities/events?  E.g. Korea Student Association.
column23: Are you or have you ever been actively part of a religious student organization or regularly attend/observe religious activities/events?
column24: Are you part of a sports student organization or regularly participate in organized sports? e.g. Club Soccer
column25: On a scale of 1-5, with 5 being the highest, how would you rate your USC social experience?
column26: Approximately, what % of your tuition was covered by merit scholarships?
column27: Have you ever held a paid job during any semester at USC?
column28: During this semester, what percentage of your available time do you spend working (paid or non-paid)?
column29: During this semester, what percentage of your available time do you spend with your friends (online or in-person)?
column30: During this semester, what percentage of your available time do you spend with your family (online or in-person)?
column31: Do you prefer to study alone? (vs. studying in a group)
column32: During this semester, what percentage of your available time do you spend on classwork outside of class?
column33: On a scale of 1-5, with 5 being the highest, how would you rate your overall USC experience?
column35: What is your age? (Please only enter a number)
column36: Your home country. Please enter the 2-letter country abbreviation. (United States = US, China = CN) You can find the list of abbreviations here: https://www.iban.com/country-codes
column37: If your home country is US, what is the zip code of your childhood home? (If the US is not your home country, type in 'N/A')
column38: Do you consider California your home?
column39: How many languages are you proficient in conversionally?
column40: What are your primary form(s) of learning about current events? (e.g. what is viral, news, entertainment)
column41: Do you consider yourself someone who loves to travel?
column42: Do you consider yourself a foodie?
column43: Have you prioritized purchasing based on the sustainability of the brand or product?
column44: Do you carry and use a reusable water bottle?
column45: What percentage of your meals during the semester are purchased from a delivery service (i.e. Uber Eats, Postmates, etc.)?
column46: What percentage of your transportation during the semester was using a ride-sharing service (i.e. Uber, Lyft, etc.)?  Exclude USC's free Lyft program.
